subject: new pictures
body:
--- On Mon, 6/16/08, Anetta Klemens <anetta@mc2mm.com> wrote:

From: Anetta Klemens <anetta@mc2mm.com>
Subject: FW: low res-Emma
To: nadja2102@yahoo.com
Date: Monday, June 16, 2008, 12:21 PM

HI Emma:)
How are you? I' ve just received  a link with low res images from the test
with Joanna. I saved In your folder the high res images ( the best we chose)
. Also, I checked your schedule and you are clear today. BY the way, I would
like you to get a copy of your passport and also 20 tearshets in order to
renew your visa. 

Let me know your thoughts.

Anetta


Anetta Klemens
MC2 Model Management 
6 West, 14th Street, 3rd floor
New York, NY 10011
t.646-638-3722, ext.222
f.646-638-3738
anetta@mc2mm.com 
-----Original Message-----
From: Joanna Totolici [mailto:joanna@totolici.com] 
Sent: Monday, June 16, 2008 12:47 AM
To: Anetta@mc2mm.com>
Subject: low res-Emma

HI!
Soo a few of these are already retouched here and in high res..
